# ViraStack web — full context for LLMs and tooling

This file describes the `virastack-showcase` Next.js application: routing, i18n, documentation pipeline, and where to change UI copy vs MDX content. Use it when editing this repository or answering questions about the public site.

## Canonical site

- Production host: https://virastack.com
- Root request redirects to default locale: `/en/` (see `app/page.tsx`).
- `next.config.mjs` sets `trailingSlash: true` — prefer URLs with a trailing slash when linking.

## What this repo is

- A **showcase and documentation site** for ViraStack open-source projects (boilerplates, libraries, guides).
- **UI strings** are translated with **next-intl** (`messages/en.json`, `messages/tr.json`).
- **Long-form docs** for some products use **Nextra 4** + **MDX** under `content/<locale>/...`, rendered by the catch-all route `app/[locale]/[...mdxPath]/`.

## Locales

- Supported: `en`, `tr`.
- Default locale: `en` (`constants/i18n.constants.ts`, `nextra-i18n.shared.mjs`).
- Nextra locale list must stay in sync: `NEXTRA_I18N` in `nextra-i18n.shared.mjs` is the single source for Nextra; `routing` in `i18n/routing.ts` uses the same locale codes via `SUPPORTED_LOCALES`.

## High-level directory map

- `app/` — App Router. Locale segment: `app/[locale]/`.
  - `app/page.tsx` — redirects to `/en`.
  - `app/[locale]/layout.tsx` — shell: header, sidebar, theme, toasts, `NextIntlClientProvider`, `QueryProvider`, Google Analytics.
  - `app/[locale]/[...mdxPath]/` — Nextra MDX pages (dynamic; see `page.tsx` for metadata and `dynamic = "force-dynamic"` rationale).
  - Other folders under `app/[locale]/` — React pages (about, roadmap, project landing pages, demos).
- `content/en/`, `content/tr/` — MDX trees per product (e.g. `mask/`, `password/`). Sidebar order/titles use `_meta.js` files.
- `components/` — Shared UI (includes shadcn-style components under `components/ui/`).
- `data/projects.ts` — Project cards: name, `descriptionKey` (for next-intl), paths, optional `docsUrl`, GitHub `repo`, status.
- `messages/en.json`, `messages/tr.json` — next-intl message catalogs.
- `i18n/` — `routing.ts`, `request.ts` (loads messages, `timeZone: "Europe/Istanbul"`), `navigation.ts` (locale-aware `Link`).
- `public/` — Static assets; `llms.txt` and `llms-full.txt` are served here at site root.

## Technology stack (package highlights)

- Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript.
- Tailwind CSS 4, PostCSS.
- next-intl for i18n.
- Nextra 4 + nextra-theme-docs for MDX docs; theme styles imported in `app/[locale]/layout.tsx`.
- TanStack React Query, TanStack Table (where used).
- Forms: React Hook Form, Zod, `@hookform/resolvers`.
- UI: Radix / shadcn-style primitives, lucide-react, Sonner, next-themes, Framer Motion / motion, Recharts (demos).
- Scoped npm packages used in demos: `@virastack/mask`, `@virastack/password`.

## Configuration notes

- `next.config.mjs`: composes `createNextIntlPlugin()` and `nextra()`. Defines `i18n` for Nextra from `NEXTRA_I18N`, `env` for `NEXTRA_*`, and a `webpack.DefinePlugin` block so Nextra server chunks receive `process.env.NEXTRA_DEFAULT_LOCALE` and `process.env.NEXTRA_LOCALES` (commented as fixing MDX 500 on Vercel).
- `output: "standalone"` for container/edge-friendly builds.
- Redirects: `/labs` → `/roadmap`, `/support` → `/community` (per locale prefix in config).

## Product list (from `data/projects.ts`)

- Next.js Boilerplate — `/nextjs-boilerplate`, repo virastack/nextjs-boilerplate
- AI Rules — `/ai`, repo virastack/ai
- Input Mask — docs `/mask/getting-started`, repo virastack/mask
- Password Toggle — docs `/password/getting-started`, repo virastack/password
- Modern Web in 3 Minutes — `/modern-web-in-3-minutes`, repo virastack/modern-web-in-3-minutes
- TanStack Boilerplate — `/tanstack-boilerplate`, status In Dev
- Start (CLI) — `/cli`, status Research, repo virastack/cli
- Standards — `/standards`, status Coming Soon, repo virastack/standards
- Error Guard — `/error-guard`, status Coming Soon, repo virastack/error-guard

## Editing guidelines for contributors

- **New UI copy** for locale-aware pages: add keys to both `messages/en.json` and `messages/tr.json`; use `useTranslations` or server APIs from next-intl as elsewhere in the app.
- **Navigation / sidebar**: `components/app-sidebar.tsx` references `projects` from `data/projects.ts` and translation keys for labels.
- **New MDX documentation**: add under `content/en/<slug>/` and mirror structure in `content/tr/<slug>/` when Turkish is required; maintain `_meta.js` for Nextra navigation.
- **Project card**: extend `data/projects.ts` and add matching description keys in message JSON files.

## Scripts (package.json)

- `pnpm dev` — Next dev server
- `pnpm build` — production build (`NEXT_TURBOPACK=0 next build`)
- `pnpm start` — production server
- `pnpm lint` — ESLint

## Optional

- Search UI assets live under `public/_pagefind/` (Pagefind).
